title: senna mexicana var. mexicana
intro: Senna mexicana var. mexicana, also known as the Mexican senna or senna, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Americas. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its ability to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of senna include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and improve digestive health, although it should be used under medical supervision. Senna can be prepared as a tea or capsule, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects and reduce potential side effects.
